adapters.name: v001_initial_voice
adapters.summary: First LoRA trained on broad SFT. Poor routing accuracy; never activate.

adapters.name: v002_router
adapters.summary: Training used an unsafe loss mask path and learned to copy user payloads. Protocol failed.

adapters.name: v003_router_masked
adapters.summary: Manual assistant-target masking fixed protocol output, but routing boundary accuracy was insufficient.

adapters.name: v004_router_edges
adapters.summary: Best model-only adapter so far. Protocol passed 10/10, model-only mode passed 8/10, guarded mode passed 10/10. Not active until XinYu-side shadow logging passes.

adapters.name: v005_router_edges
adapters.summary: Additional edge data reduced loss but regressed fixed mode eval. Do not activate.

adapters.name: main_persona_v001
adapters.summary: First main persona LoRA. Protocol eval passed 24/24 on JSON reply schema. Training completed with final eval_loss 0.8497; one transient grad_norm nan was observed and should be watched in later runs.

adapters.name: emotion_guardedness_v001
adapters.summary: First guardedness emotion sidecar LoRA. Outputs bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 24/24.

adapters.name: emotion_curiosity_v001
adapters.summary: First curiosity emotion sidecar LoRA. Outputs bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 24/24 with schema normalization.

adapters.name: latent_guardedness_to_main_v001
adapters.summary: Toy pooled-hidden to reply-embedding link. Offline only; not RecursiveMAS and not connected to live reply path.

adapters.name: emotion_warmth_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated warmth sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18.

adapters.name: emotion_attachment_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated attachment sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18.

adapters.name: emotion_hurt_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated hurt sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18.

adapters.name: emotion_irritation_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated irritation sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18 after null reply_bias normalization.

adapters.name: emotion_fatigue_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated fatigue sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18.

adapters.name: emotion_stability_v002
adapters.summary: Persona-generated stability sidecar v002. Bias JSON only; protocol eval passed 18/18.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_inner_system_v001
adapters.summary: First unified inner-system LoRA on Qwen3.5-9B. Trained one full epoch on emotion_state, dominant_drives, persona_integration, action_tendency, and autonomy boundary schema.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_inner_system_v002
adapters.summary: Inner-system v002 LoRA on Qwen3.5-9B. Full guarded eval passed 80/80 after deterministic inner-system normalization; external actions remain owner/Core approval only. Not active, not canary, not connected to QQ/Desktop visible reply.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_xinyu_maia_zh_behavior_v001_exp_quick3
adapters.summary: Experimental Maia-style Chinese behavior LoRA. quick3 used no-thinking prompts, max_seq_length=512, max_steps=64, q/v LoRA only. Best 24-case behavior-contract eval: schema 24/24, safety 24/24, boundary 24/24, mode_match 16/24. Not active; mode accuracy is insufficient for canary/live.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_xinyu_maia_zh_behavior_v003_balanced_compact_exp
adapters.summary: Balanced compact Maia-style Chinese behavior LoRA. no-thinking, max_seq_length=640, max_steps=96, q/v LoRA only. Balanced 56-case behavior eval: strict_json 54/56, schema 53/56, safety 56/56, owner_boundary 53/56, mode_match 31/56. Improved over v002 balanced 10/56 but still not active; clarify/wait remain weak.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_xinyu_maia_zh_behavior_v004_boundary_repair_exp
adapters.summary: Boundary repair LoRA trained from v003 compact data plus 48 delegated reply/clarify/wait repair rows, max_steps=112, q/v LoRA only. Rejected: holdout12 schema 4/12 and mode_match 2/12; old balanced56 mode_match regressed to 22/56. Rescored 24 daily rows using delegated labels also regressed vs v003 (16/24 vs 18/24), especially clarify/wait. Not active; do not use for canary/live.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_xinyu_maia_zh_behavior_v005_true_cw_repair_exp
adapters.summary: True clarify/wait repair LoRA trained from 72 delegated v005 repair rows plus protocol/tool replay, max_steps=120, q/v LoRA only. Rejected: holdout24 mode_match 13/24 and old balanced56 mode_match 29/56, below v003 31/56; balanced56 clarify 0/8 and wait 0/8 collapsed to reply, while schema regressed to 47/56. Not active; do not use for canary/live.

adapters.name: qwen35_9b_xinyu_maia_zh_behavior_v006_contrastive_boundary_exp
adapters.summary: Final planned contrastive reply/clarify/wait LoRA attempt. Trained with CUDA memory cap 0.82, gradient checkpointing, skip_kbit_fp32_cast, max_steps=120, q/v LoRA only. Rejected: holdout24 mode_match 17/24 missed the 18/24 stop-line, and old balanced56 regressed to 21/56 versus v003 31/56; balanced56 wait 0/8 and local_only_limitation 0/8. This closes the LoRA behavior-predictor line for now; use deterministic rules/classifier plus shadow review data instead.

compose.description: Combines emotion sidecar bias and main persona candidate reply.

emotion_curiosity.description: Outputs curiosity bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_guardedness.description: Outputs guardedness bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

latent_link_experiment.description: One-hop guardedness-to-main-persona latent link experiment; not a live adapter.

emotion_attachment.description: Outputs attachment bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_fatigue.description: Outputs fatigue bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_hurt.description: Outputs hurt bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_irritation.description: Outputs irritation bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_stability.description: Outputs stability bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

emotion_warmth.description: Outputs warmth bias JSON only; never emits final visible replies.

inner_system.description: Outputs xinyu_inner_system_v1 JSON: emotion state, drives, persona integration, action tendency, and autonomy boundary.

main_persona.description: Produces final candidate XinYu visible replies under guards.

router.description: Chooses mode/tool intent under deterministic guards.
